title: PatientHistorySummary
description: AUCDI-aligned encounter history summary (HIST-3, operator-approved 2026-07-11): a deterministic, clinician-facing digest of everything the patient self-disclosed or self-measured during ONE encounter — conditions, medications, allergies, family/social history, offered vitals — each entry carrying its provenance channel, verified:false, and its Digital Tablet omnibus anchor. AUDIENCE AND BOUNDARY: this artifact is for the Clinician Verification Portal reviewer and the audit trail (evidence_tree). It is NEVER injected into a ContextPacket and never feeds back to the trunk LLM. It is ENCOUNTER-SCOPED and memory-only — persistence beyond the session is a separately-gated Critical item; nothing may write this to durable storage until that gate is green. Every entry is UNVERIFIED patient account by construction: verified is const false, and the mandatory disclaimer states it. AU Core conformance fields are ADVISORY structural checks against the vendored StructureDefinition snapshot (2.0.1-ci-build) — recorded, never gating, and terminology bindings are not evaluated (live NCTS required).

run_id.description: The pipeline run this summary was assembled from (correlates with the VerificationReport and ledger entry).

dataset_receipt.description: The pinned Digital Tablet omnibus version the entries' fhir_path anchors were proven against.

disclaimer.const: PATIENT-REPORTED, UNVERIFIED: every entry below is the patient's own account or a patient-provided measurement captured during this encounter. Nothing here is a confirmed diagnosis, a verified medication record, or a clinician-obtained measurement. Clinician confirmation is required before any clinical action.
disclaimer.description: Mandatory and fixed — a summary without this exact statement is contract-invalid.

sections.description: Entries grouped by standardised history-taking section. Empty arrays are valid (section taken, nothing disclosed).

summary_sha256.description: sha256 over the canonical JSON of {run_id, generated_at_utc, dataset_receipt, disclaimer, sections} — the audit anchor for exactly what the clinician was shown.

fact_id.description: The ContextPacket fact this entry was assembled from (case-N).

as_stated.description: The patient's words / patient-provided value, verbatim as it entered the packet. Never normalised, coded, or interpreted here.

provenance.description: The declared patient-provided channel (mirrors the packet fact's provenance stamp).

verified.description: Const false — nothing in this artifact can be verified; verification happens at the portal, by a human.

fhir_path.description: Digital Tablet omnibus anchor (proven), or null when withheld.

taxonomy_tags.description: Deterministic consult tags carried over from the audit-channel provenance node, when present.

au_core.description: ADVISORY structural conformance result against the vendored AU Core snapshot (fhir-broker validateResource) for sections with a mapped profile (conditions, medications, allergies). Recorded, never gating.
